title: Palindrome List

	def lPalin(self, A):

hints: Use two pointers (slow and fast) to find the middle of the linked list.
When fast pointer reaches the end, slow pointer will be at the middle.
Reverse the second half of the linked list starting from slow.next.
Compare the first half with the reversed second half.
If all values match, return 1 (palindrome), otherwise return 0.
You can use the reverse linked list technique to reverse the second half.
